name: Causal Push
scaffolding_intent: Element A rushes toward element B with an impact burst at collision, scaffolding causality and consequence

parameters.name: entityPrefixB
parameters.description: Entity ID of the target receiving the push

parameters.name: impactScale
parameters.description: Size multiplier for the impact star

correction_intent: Child described an incorrect causal link between entities
suggestion_intent: Child hasn't described the causal link between entities
